name: French-Style Cream Cheese Spread
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, stir together the cream cheese, margarine or butter, minced garlic, chopped parsley, water, white wine vinegar, Worcestershire sauce, Herbes de Provence, and seasoning salt. Cover and refrigerate overnight.
2. To serve, garnish with fresh thyme if desired. Serve with crackers.
Makes: 1 1/3 cups
Source: Good Housekeeping Magazine, Dec. 1992
Calories: 58 per tablespoon; 6 gm fat; 1 gm protein; 72 mg sodium
